body_excerpt: In a2dp_vendor_ldac_decoder_decode_packet of a2dp_vendor_ldac_decoder.cc, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to remote code execution with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
